{{Infobox character
| name = Sage of Red Faith
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Shadow|shadow]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, techniques for raising Blood Shadows}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[cloud madra]], memory recording sessions, cycling patterns to feed his Blood Shadow dream aura and blood essence, carves scripts in rings, [[Blood aura|blood aura]], nine daggers in formation}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Sage of Red Faith]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, Overlord}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Redmoon Hall]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Blood Sage]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Sage of Red Faith Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage]] of [[Red Faith]], also known as the [[Blood Sage]], is a powerful figure and the founder of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] cult. He serves as the master of [[Redmoon Hall]], an organization where members ranging from [[Heralds]] to [[Jades]] follow his direction through [[Blood Shadows]]. Physically, he is described as a monochrome specter with extremely pale skin and hair, often appearing to have no blood in him. In combat, he has been known to utilize nine daggers and possesses the ability to manipulate blood [[aura]] and [[madra]]. He is noted for his research into the nature of the [[Phoenix]] and his specific techniques regarding [[Blood Shadows]], which he uses to influence or mentor others. The [[Sage]] maintains a complex relationship with various factions and individuals. He has collaborated with the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]], utilizing tools provided by him for spatial transportation. While he is a legendary force, his relationship with his own [[Blood Shadow]] has been fraught with difficulty due to his refusal to subordinate himself to others. He is also associated with the pursuit of [[Yerin Arelius]] and has been involved in significant historical conflicts, including stopping a murderous [[Archlord]] centuries ago. Despite his immense power, he is characterized by a certain level of volatility and has been described as potentially lapsing into madness.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a supposed entity or person associated with [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is an ally of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] provided a method for feeding the [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] has techniques for raising [[Blood Shadows]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage]] of [[Red Faith]] is a [[Blood Sage]] who appears as a pale human with red paint or bloody streaks running down from his eyes. He advocates for the expansion of [[Blood Shadows]] into the wild and claims to have received sponsorship from a [[Monarch]]. Having previously provided lessons to [[Calan Archer]], he attempted to develop a technique to fuse with his [[Blood Shadow]] rather than his [[Remnant]]. During the events of this book, he provides special instructions to [[Yan Shoumei]] and expresses skepticism regarding the speed of [[Eithan]]'s advancement. Ultimately, he is set to serve as the leader for [[Calan]]'s expedition.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a [[Blood Sage]] who looks like a frog with red paint tracking down from his eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] encourages the spreading of [[Blood Shadows]] on the wild.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Calan Archer]] took lessons from the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] claims to have been sponsored by a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] attempted to devise a method to fuse with his [[Blood Shadow]] instead of his own [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] gave [[Yan Shoumei]] special instructions.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] will lead [[Calan]]'s expedition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a pale human with bloody streaks down his face.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] questioned how [[Eithan]] advanced so quickly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a character who cooperates with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Overlord]] and the twin of [[Redmoon]], the [[Sage]] of [[Red Faith]] utilizes cloud madra and shadow to prevent physical distractions within his laboratory. To further his studies, he employs memory recording sessions to learn from [[Yerin]] and utilizes blood [[aura]] alongside a formation of nine daggers. He established a symbiotic relationship with a created [[Blood Shadow]], developing specific cycling patterns to provide the entity with blood essence and [[dream aura]]. Although he believes his attempt to create a subordinate failed because he produced a perfect copy rather than an imperfect one, he continues his work while carving [[scripts]] into rings to conceal various locations. Throughout his endeavors, he maintains a deep hatred for [[Herald]] [[Remnants]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a character who uses cloud madra and shadow to avoid physical distractions in his laboratory.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] uses memory recording sessions to learn from [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] created a [[Blood Shadow]] and established a symbiotic relationship with it.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] developed cycling patterns to feed his [[Blood Shadow]] [[dream aura]] and blood essence.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] believes he failed to create a subordinate [[Blood Shadow]] because he created a perfect copy instead of an imperfect one.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] carves [[scripts]] in rings to hide locations.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is the twin of [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] hates [[Herald]] [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] uses blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] uses nine daggers in formation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] might view the name [[Ghostwind Hall]] as mocking.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] used a series of daggers in battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sage of Red Faith]] gifted a [[Divine Treasure]] to [[Calling Storms]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“This is a Heart’s Gem,” the Blood Sage said,<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Sage of Red Faith took a bloody finger from his mouth. “How did you advance so quickly? Even with our Monarch providing you with resources, it should have taken you much longer.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The man, an Overlord, didn’t flinch. “The Sage of Red Faith!”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Redmoon Hall]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
